brain_readme_text:
OHUN Tool Launcher v0.9

A lightweight, plugin-based tool launcher for Android.
The main app knows nothing вЂ” it just launches tools.
Each tool is fully independent.

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
How it works:

1. App scans the tools/ folder
2. Each tool has main.py + meta.json
3. Tool opens via open_ui() function
4. Tool talks to launcher only through tool_api.py
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
Features:

в†’ Tool Store   вЂ” install tools from GitHub
в†’ Theme Store  вЂ” change the look
в†’ Lang Store   вЂ” change the language
в†’ Brain        вЂ” you are reading it right now
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
Tech stack:

Python + Kivy
Pydroid 3 (Android)
GitHub API
Buildozer (coming in v1.0)
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
Version history:

v0.1 вЂ” Basic GUI, plugin system
v0.2 вЂ” OutputScreen, open_ui()
v0.3 вЂ” NavBar, Settings
v0.4 вЂ” tool_api.py
v0.5 вЂ” Tool Store
v0.6 вЂ” Theme system
v0.7 вЂ” Language system
v0.8 вЂ” Theme + Lang Store
v0.9 вЂ” Search, update, delete, meta.json
v1.0 вЂ” .apk Buildozer (coming soon)
brain_devguide_text:
How to create a tool for OHUN Launcher

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
1. FOLDER STRUCTURE:

tools/
в””в”Ђв”Ђ your_tool/
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ main.py
    в””в”Ђв”Ђ meta.json
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
2. META.JSON:

{
  "name": "Your Tool",
  "icon": ">>",
  "color": "#2277ff",
  "version": "1.0",
  "author": "YourName",
  "description": "What it does"
}
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
3. MAIN.PY (minimal):

from kivy.uix.popup import Popup
from kivy.uix.label import Label

def open_ui():
    lbl = Label(text="Hello from my tool!")
    p = Popup(title="My Tool", content=lbl,
              size_hint=(0.9, 0.5))
    p.open()
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
4. TOOL API:

from tool_api import (
    get_tool_dir,
    save_tool_data,
    load_tool_data,
    notify
)

get_tool_dir(__file__)
в†’ your tool folder path

save_tool_data(__file__, 'data.json', {})
load_tool_data(__file__, 'data.json', default={})
в†’ save and load your data

notify("Done!")
в†’ show message in status bar
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
5. RULES:

в†’ Always use open_ui() as entry point
в†’ Catch ALL errors inside your tool
в†’ Never crash the launcher
в†’ Keep your tool in its own folder
в†’ Use tool_api.py to talk to launcher
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
6. TOOL MANAGER (required):

from utils import tool_manager

TOOL_NAME = "Your Tool"

def open_ui():
    if tool_manager.is_active(TOOL_NAME):
        tool_manager.focus(TOOL_NAME)
        return
    content = YourUI()
    popup = Popup(...)
    content._popup = popup
    tool_manager.register(TOOL_NAME, content, popup)
    popup.open()
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
7. MINIMIZE / CLOSE:

def _minimize(self, *args):
    if hasattr(self, '_popup'):
        self._popup.dismiss()

def _close(self, *args):
    tool_manager.close(TOOL_NAME)
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
8. DOUBLE-TAP PROTECTION:

def _start(self, *args):
    if getattr(self, '_searching', False):
        return
    self._searching = True
    ...

def _done(self):
    self._searching = False
    ...
